entry.title: KMP算法的一些总结
entry.content:
KMP 是一种改进的字符串匹配算法，相比常见的暴力算法时间复杂度降低不少。

暴力字符串匹配算法的缺陷

暴力字符串匹配算法失配后会回溯到开头的下一个字符重新开始匹配，这样浪费了大量的时间在回溯上，在最坏情况下时间复杂度可达 O(mn)。

KMP 的过程

KMP (Knuth-Morris-Pratt) 算法是一个快速在文本串 (text) 中查找模式串 (pat) 的算法。为了使不进行无意义的回溯，KMP 算法对模式串引入了一个 PMT (Partial Match Table)，亦即部分匹配表来在匹配过程中进行合理跳转。PMT 也就是从 pat[0] 开始，后缀与前缀能匹配上的长度。模式串 “abcdabcdeaa” 的 PMT 如下。

假如我们使文本串 text = “abcdabcdcabcdabcdeaa”，模式串 pat = “abcdabcdeaa”。第一次匹配时， text[8] = ‘c’ 和 pat[8] = ‘e’ 失配。

而此时模式串和文本串前 8 位都是匹配的，同时前缀和后缀都是 “abcd”，我们可以根据 PMT 记的数据移动模式串如下

并不匹配，同时没有相等的前缀和后缀，现在应该寻找下一个 text[n] == pat[0] == ‘a’，如下：

这一次我们成功匹配，如下：

代码如下：

#include <iostream>#include <string>#include <vector>void generate_pmt(const std::string&, std::vector<int>&);long long kmp_first_match(const std::string&, const std::string&, std::vector<int>&);int main() {    std::vector<int> pmt;    std::string txt = "abcdabcdcabcdabcdeaa";    std::string pat = "abcdabcdeaa";    pmt.resize(pat.length());    auto ans = kmp_first_match(pat, txt, pmt);    std::cout << ans << std::endl;    return 0;}void generate_pmt(const std::string& pat, std::vector<int>& pmt) {    long long j = 0;    for (long long i = 1; i < pat.length(); ++i) {        while (pat[i] != pat[j] && j > 0) {            j = pmt[j - 1];        }        if (pat[i] == pat[j]) {            j++;        }        pmt[i] = j;    }}long long kmp_first_match(const std::string& pat, const std::string& txt, std::vector<int>& pmt) {    long long j;    generate_pmt(pat, pmt);    j = 0;    for (long long i = 0; i < txt.length(); ++i) {        while (txt[i] != pat[j] && j > 0) {            j = pmt[j - 1];        }        if (txt[i] == pat[j]) {            j++;        }        if (j == pat.length()) {            // 此时 txt 的数组下标减去 pat 的长度再加 1 就是匹配到的子串第一个字符的下标            return i - j + 1;        }    }    return -1;}

效率分析

时间复杂度 O(m + n)，空间复杂度 O(m)，相比暴力算法快很多，同时也只多占一个 PMT 数组的空间。

entry.title: 编译Android Linux Kernel并生成Flashable Zip
entry.content:
适用于 Android 10, ARM 64

Clone 所需的 Repository

Clone kernel repo

git clone https://github.com/ExampleUser/ExampleRepo.git

Clone toolchains

# Clang_Googlegit clone https://android.googlesource.com/platform/prebuilts/clang/host/linux-x86# GCC_Google_ARM32git clone https://android.googlesource.com/platform/prebuilts/gcc/linux-x86/arm/arm-linux-androideabi-4.9# GCC_Google_ARM64git clone https://android.googlesource.com/platform/prebuilts/gcc/linux-x86/aarch64/aarch64-linux-android-4.9

Clone AnyKernel3

git clone https://github.com/osm0sis/AnyKernel3

确认 defconfig

比如说 arm64 的内核的 defconfig 一般在 arch/arm64/configs

编译内核

cd ${Your Kernel Path}

清理编译环境

make clean && make mrproper

准备编译环境

mkdir -p outexport ARCH=arm64export CLANG_PATH=${Your Clang_Google Path}/${Prefered Clang Version}/binexport PATH=${CLANG_PATH}:${PATH}export CLANG_TRIPLE=aarch64-linux-gnu-export CROSS_COMPILE=${Your GCC_Google_ARM64 Path}/bin/aarch64-linux-android-export CROSS_COMPILE_ARM32=${Your GCC_Google_ARM32 Path}/bin/arm-linux-androideabi-export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=~${Your Clang_Google Path}/${Prefered Clang Version}/lib64:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

设置 defconfig

make CC=clang AR=llvm-ar NM=llvm-nm OBJCOPY=llvm-objcopy STRIP=llvm-strip O=out ${defconfig name}

开始编译

make CC=clang AR=llvm-ar NM=llvm-nm OBJCOPY=llvm-objcopy STRIP=llvm-strip O=out -j${$(nproc --all) / 2}

用 AnyKernel 生成 Flashable Zip

cp ${Your Kernel Path/out/arch/arm64/boot/Image.gz-dtb} ${Your AnyKernel3 Path}cd ${Your AnyKernel3 Path}zip -r9 flashable.zip * -x .git README.md *placeholder

需要注意的是 AnyKernel 需要一定的改动才能生成 Flashable Zip，详见官方文档。

entry.title: Manjaro 安装后的配置
entry.content:
闲得无聊又把 Manjaro 装回来了。。正好这次做个笔记看都干了些啥。
仅适用于 Manjaro KDE，对于其他桌面环境仅供参考。

# Set Pacman Mirrorssudo pacman-mirrors -i -c China -m rank# Or do it yourselfsudo vim /etc/pacman.d/mirrorlist# insert the mirror you like to the head of the file# for example:# Server = https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/archlinux/$repo/os/$arch# Add archlinuxcn reposudo nano /etc/pacman.conf## Add following into the back of the file# [archlinuxcn]# SigLevel = Optional TrustedOnly# Server = https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/archlinuxcn/$arch# Update repos && Upgrade all packagessudo pacman -Syu archlinuxcn-keyring# Upgrade kernel to latest linux-stable (which is 5.5 atm)# linux55-nvidia-440xx is the driver for nvidia graphcis card (GTX 1070 here)# headers and virtualbox-host-modules are optionalsudo pacman -S linux59 linux59-headers linux59-nvidia-440xx linux59-virtualbox-host-modules# Remove old kernels (which is 5.4 atm)sudo pacman -Rs linux58 linux58-nvidia-440xx# Fuck default folder named in Chinesenano .config/user-dirs.dirs## Edit the following lines:# XDG_DESKTOP_DIR="$HOME/Desktop"# XDG_DOWNLOAD_DIR="$HOME/Download"# XDG_TEMPLATES_DIR="$HOME/Templates"# XDG_PUBLICSHARE_DIR="$HOME/Public"# XDG_DOCUMENTS_DIR="$HOME/Documents"# XDG_MUSIC_DIR="$HOME/Music"# XDG_PICTURES_DIR="$HOME/Pictures"# XDG_VIDEOS_DIR="$HOME/Videos"## Then manually delete folders at $HOME and create## corresponding folders named in English# You should reboot now to apply folder name changesreboot# Dividing Lineecho "---------------------------------"# Apply themes## Install Adapta theme from official## repositoriessudo pacman -S adapta-kde adapta-gtk-theme## Then manually set themes in system## settings. You can also downloads## other themes directly in system## settings# Double click to open folders or files# in Dolphin:## 设置 - 工作空间行为 - 常规行为 - 点击行为 - 双击打开文件和文件夹# zsh && oh-my-zsh &&## As of Manjaro KDE 19.0.2, zsh is pre-installed,## just install git and oh-my-zshsudo pacman -S gitsh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)"## If forgot to set default term## DO NOT USE sudo HERE SINCE IT WILL CHANGE THE DEFAULT SHELL OF ROOT!!!chsh -s $(which zsh)## I prefer this config: https://github.com/caiogondim/bullet-train.zsh## Place it in $ZSH_CUSTOM/themes, here $ZSH_CUSTOM == ~/.zshmkdir -p ~/.zsh/themes## Get bullet-train.zsh-theme in advance and locate to its positionmv bullet-train.zsh-theme ~/.zsh/themes## Edit ~/.zshrcnano ~/.zshrc## Find ZSH_THEME and edit# ZSH_THEME="bullet-train"## Find ZSH_CUSTOM and remove comments# ZSH_CUSTOM="$HOME/.zsh"## Save the file.# Use yay to install AUR packagessudo pacman -S yay# Optional: To build Lineage OS, install dependenciesyay -S lineageos-devel# Optional: a lot of fonts incoming## Get cascadia code from https://github.com/microsoft/cascadia-code/releases## I prefer to download both versions, with or without powerline.## And Sarasa Gothic from https://github.com/be5invis/Sarasa-Gothic/releases## then install them manually## Then noto-fonts and adobe-source-han## (I know they are duplicated, but I'm fuckin' boring)sudo pacman -S noto-fonts noto-fonts-cjk noto-fonts-emoji noto-fonts-extrasudo pacman -S adobe-source-han-sans-otc-fonts adobe-source-han-serif-otc-fontssudo pacman -S adobe-source-code-pro-fonts## Miscellaneous fontssudo pacman -S wqy-microhei wqy-microhei-lite wqy-zenhei ttf-roboto ttf-dejavu ttf-wps-fonts# Fcitx && fcitx-sogoupinyinsudo pacman -S fcitx-im kcm-fcitx fcitx-googlepinyin fcitx-skin-material# Add profiles ~/.xprofile and rebootecho "export GTK_IM_MODULES=fcitx\n\export QT_IM_MODULES=fcitx\n\export XMODIFIERS=\"@im=fcitx\"" >> ~/.xprofile# Configure gitgit config --global user.name ""git config --global user.email ""# Generate ssh keyssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -C "eterocell@outlook.com"sudo pacman -S xclipxclip =sel clip < ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub# Now ssh-key should have been copied to your paste board, set it in github# Check connectionssh -T git@github.com# Generate a GPG keygpg --full-gen-key# Choose "RSA and RSA" "keysize = 4096" "0 = key does not expire"# List generated keygpg --list-secret-keys --keyid-format LONG# `sec` stands for 'secret key', ssb stands for 'secret subkey'# copy the public key and set in githubgpg --armor --export ${key ID which is after sec} | xclip --selection clipboard# Then you can commit individual commits usinggit commit --gpg-sign=${key ID which is after sec}# Or just set all commits sign with itgit config --global user.signinkey ${key ID which is after sec}git config --global commit.gpgsign true# I've encrypted my SSH and GPG keys and stored online, convenient though risky# Optional: Other packagessudo pacman -S base-devel gcc gdb clang llvm vim google-chrome visual-studio-code-bin wps-officesudo pacman -S nodejs npm maven gradle foxit-reader unrar unzip p7zip netease-cloud-music telegram-desktopsudo pacman -S screenfetch neofetchyay -S jetbrains-toolbox electron-ssr# I recommend electron-ssr from https://github.com/shadowsocksrr/electron-ssr/releases# Which is still mantained

entry.title: Yoga C940 使用3个月后感想
entry.content:
一直都想有一台带触控屏的 Windows 二合一笔记本，本来是非常心水 Surface Pro 的，但是看到 C940 的配置和价格之后我只想说——真香。

很早之前，大概还是 Windows 8 时期就听过以二合一闻名的 Yoga 系列，但是真正让我动了买二合一心思的还是 Surface Pro，至于理由，其实是肝舰 C。。。

当然，碍于学业还有钱包的问题，一直都没有买。而大学入学时，考虑到性能问题，最终入的还是 P775TM1-G 这种旅行重量重达将近 6kg 的大砖块。。因为几乎每天都要来往于实验室和宿舍，特别是晚上 21:30 摸完鱼回宿舍时还要背着那么重的电脑，最终压断了我为了省钱苦苦支撑的脊椎，开始考虑入手一台轻薄本。

最初，我仍然想选择 Surface Pro 7，但看到 C940 的评测之后几经考虑还是选择了 C940。

让我放弃苏菲的原因大概时以下几个：

  • 第七代的苏菲终于终于终于引入了 USB-C，只有一个，而且不是 Thunderbolt 3。。而 C940 有一个 USB-A，两个 Thunderbolt 3。
  • 价格昂贵，苏菲在预想价位能买到 i5-1035G4，8GB 内存，256GB SSD（包含键盘盖和 Surface Pen）的型号。同价位的 C940 则有 i7-1065G7，16GB 内存，以及整整 1TB 的 PM981A。
  • 苏菲被人吐槽很多的品控、售后等问题。

最终，我下单了 C940。开箱时我就被它的外观惊艳到了——精巧的外观、机身摸起来顺滑的手感、深灰色的配色，以及最重要的，够轻够薄。

配置如下：

CPU: Intel Core i7-1065G7 (4C8T, 1.5GHz Base, up to 3.9GHz)
Graphics: Intel Iris Plus 940 (64EUs)
RAM: 16GB LPDDR4X 3733MHz
Storage: 1TB NVMe PM981A
Screen: 14 inch 4K IPS (3840 x 2160, 16:9, HDR400)
Weight: 1.35kg

对于一个轻薄本来说，这样的性能无疑是够用的。其中 i7-1065G7 作为 Ice Lake 10nm 的新产品，其性能让我很是期待，其 Cinebench R20 结果如下：

多核性能已经接近 i7-6700HQ，CPU 性能是相当不错的。至于 Iris Plus 性能有多强我倒是不太关注，至少对于一般桌面应用在 4K 分辨率下的表现我还是很满意的。

说到 4K 就不得不说一下这块屏幕。3840 x 2160 的 IPS，支持十点触控，支持手写笔（笔记本内置一个 4096 级压感的）。从网上找到的参数:

  • 86.5% DCI-P3 色域以及 98.8% sRGB 色域
  • 最高亮度 550 nits
  • 对比度 1478:1

高分屏给我带来的最直观的观感便是 Windows 在 1080p 奥利给一样的字体渲染明显改善。。终于可以摆脱 Mactype 这种有时候会明显拖慢速度的不完美解法了。

再说说实际日常体验。

从去年 12 月初购买，到现在已有 3 个月的使用，日常就是 JetBrains 系的 IDE，VSCode 之类的编辑器。除此之外还有较简单的笔记、网页、视频等轻量任务，其余较重的任务都交给 P775TM1-G 的 i7-8700k、32GB 内存完成了。可以说 i7-1065G7 和 16GB 内存基本完美满足了我对轻薄本的性能要求。

续航是本机最大的槽点之一。4K 屏的耗电量是真的有点高。。正常浏览网页、写代码什么的能坚持 3-5 小时不等，可以说续航并不优秀。

除此之外，Sound-Bar 绝对是本机又一大亮点。配合 Dolby Atmos，外放质量足够好。当然和我的 XBA-Z5 以及 WH-1000XM2 比起来肯定还是逊色很多的（废话，这么比根本不公平）。

总结：
优点：

  • 外观、机身工艺一流
  • 非常有优势的价格
  • 两个满血 Thunderbolt 3 接口
  • 爽到的 4K 屏
  • 16GB 内存相对于 8GB 的提升真的很明显

特点：

  • i7-1065G7 对我来说够用的性能。
  • 虽然单纯的触控在 Windows 下体验非常糟糕，但是触控的存在对于单纯的键鼠操作还是起到了锦上添花二点作用。
  • 键盘手感还不错
  • 我用不到的 Wi-Fi 6

缺点：

  • 即使内置了 60Wh 的大电池，续航依然不尽如人意
  • 有时机身温度较高
  • 键盘方向键反人类设计

综合来说，这是让我非常满意的一台二合一笔记本。价格便宜（相对来说），强劲的性能（相对来说），优质的屏幕（4K 触控），锦上添花的特点（Sound-Bar），还有联想的品控和售后，这款产品在相对小众的二合一市场中注定拥有它的一席之地。

entry.title: [栈][水题] HDU 1022 "Train Problem I"
entry.content:
原题链接

HDU, Virtual Judge

题目

As the new term comes, the Ignatius Train Station is very busy nowadays. A lot of student want to get back to school by train(because the trains in the Ignatius Train Station is the fastest all over the world ^v^). But here comes a problem, there is only one railway where all the trains stop. So all the trains come in from one side and get out from the other side. For this problem, if train A gets into the railway first, and then train B gets into the railway before train A leaves, train A can’t leave until train B leaves. The pictures below figure out the problem. Now the problem for you is, there are at most 9 trains in the station, all the trains has an ID(numbered from 1 to n), the trains get into the railway in an order O1, your task is to determine whether the trains can get out in an order O2.

Input

The input contains several test cases. Each test case consists of an integer, the number of trains, and two strings, the order of the trains come in:O1, and the order of the trains leave:O2. The input is terminated by the end of file. More details in the Sample Input.

Output

The output contains a string “No.” if you can’t exchange O2 to O1, or you should output a line contains “Yes.”, and then output your way in exchanging the order(you should output “in” for a train getting into the railway, and “out” for a train getting out of the railway). Print a line contains “FINISH” after each test case. More details in the Sample Output.

Sample Input

3 123 3213 123 312

Sample Output

Yes.inininoutoutoutFINISHNo.FINISH

思路

从题目描述便可知这道题是典型的火车出入站的问题，直接用栈模拟便可解决。

Code

#include <iostream>#include <stack>int main() {    std::stack<char> stack_1;    int num;    int a, b, c;    bool flag[20];              // true => "in", false => "out"    std::string o1, o2;    while (std::cin >> num) {        while (!stack_1.empty()) {            stack_1.pop();        }        std::cin >> o1 >> o2;        a = b = c = 0;        while (b < num + 1 && a < num) {            if (!stack_1.empty() && stack_1.top() == o2[a]) {                stack_1.pop();                flag[c++] = false;                a++;            } else {                flag[c++] = true;                stack_1.push(o1[b++]);            }        }        if (c != num * 2) {            std::cout << "No." << std::endl;        } else {            std::cout << "Yes." << std::endl;            for (a = 0; a < num * 2; a++) {                if (flag[a]) {                    std::cout << "in" << std::endl;                } else {                    std::cout << "out" << std::endl;                }            }        }        std::cout << "FINISH" << std::endl;    }    return 0;}

entry.title: 使用 VSCode 和 MinGW 实现 Windows C/C++ 开发
entry.content:
MinGW Distro

VSCode

官方文档

  • 下载并安装 VSCode

  • 在 VSCode 中安装 C/C++ 插件

  • 下载并安装 MinGW Distro，将其解压至 C:\Program Files\MinGW

  • 打开 cmd 输入以下命令添加环境变量

setx /M path "%PATH%;C:\Program Files\MinGW\bin\"
  • 重启 cmd 输入以下命令以检查环境变量是否正确添加
g++ --versiongdb --version
  • 正确添加环境变量后，打开 VSCode，选择存放 C/C++ 代码的文件夹，新建 HelloWorld 文件夹并在其中新建 HelloWorld.cpp 文件并保存
#include <iostream>int main() {    std::cout << "Hello World" << std::endl;    return 0;}
  • 在终端中输入以下命令创建工作区
code .

  • 点击终端-运行生成任务，选择 C/C++:g++.exe build active file，你会发现 VSCode 在工作区目录中创建了 .vscode 文件夹以及其中的 tasks.json

  • 点击调试-启动调试，选择 C++ (GDB/LLDB)，选择 g++.exe build and debug active file，你会发现 VSCode 在 .vscode 文件夹中创建了 launch.json

  • 可以生成和调试之后，如果想更多修改 C/C++ 插件的设置，可以按 Ctrl+Shift+P 搜索 C/C++: 编辑配置，这将在 .vscode 文件夹中创建 c_cpp_properties.json 文件继而修改配置，修改 C/C++ 标准便是在这一步进行。

2020.7.20 更新：使用clangd扩展获得更好的 静态代码检查 和 代码补全 体验，同时与 MS 官方提供的 C/C++ 插件共存，获得最佳的 调试 与 直接运行 体验

  • 安装 llvm 工具链，包括 clang, clangd, clang-tidy 等工具
# Windows with Scoop package managerscoop install llvm

  • 在 VSCode 中安装 clangd 插件

  • 在 VSCode 的 settings.json 中调整以下设置

# 关闭 C/C++ 插件提供的静态代码检查与补全功能， clang-tidy 提供的体验更好"C_Cpp.intelliSenseEngine": "Disabled","C_Cpp.autocomplete": "Disabled","C_Cpp.errorSquiggles": "Disabled",
  • Enjoy

entry.title: [超水题] HDU 5948 "Thickest Burger"
entry.content:
原题链接

HDU, Virtual Judge

题目

ACM ICPC is launching a thick burger. The thickness (or the height) of a piece of club steak is A (1 ≤ A ≤ 100). The thickness (or the height) of a piece of chicken steak is B (1 ≤ B ≤ 100).
The chef allows to add just three pieces of meat into the burger and he does not allow to add three pieces of same type of meat. As a customer and a foodie, you want to know the maximum total thickness of a burger which you can get from the chef. Here we ignore the thickness of breads, vegetables and other seasonings.

Input

The first line is the number of test cases. For each test case, a line contains two positive integers A and B.

Output

For each test case, output a line containing the maximum total thickness of a burger.

Sample Input

1068 421 3525 7059 7965 6346 628 8292 6243 9637 28

Sample Output

1787116521719398192246235102

Hint

Consider the ﬁrst test case, since 68+68+42 is bigger than 68+42+42 the answer should be 68+68+42 = 178.
Similarly since 1+35+35 is bigger than 1+1+35, the answer of the second test case should be 1+35+35 = 71.

思路

超级大水题，没什么好说的。

Code

#include <iostream>int main() {    int times;    int a, b;    std::cin >> times;    while (times--) {        std::cin >> a >> b;        if (a > b) {            std::cout << a * 2 + b << std::endl;        } else {            std::cout << b * 2 + a << std::endl;        }    }    return 0;}

entry.title: [数学][水题] HDU 2674 "N! Again"
entry.content:
原题链接

HDU, Virtual Judge

题目

WhereIsHeroFrom: Zty, what are you doing ?
Zty: I want to calculate N!……
WhereIsHeroFrom: So easy! How big N is ?
Zty: 1 <=N <=1000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000…
WhereIsHeroFrom: Oh! You must be crazy! Are you Fa Shao?
Zty: No. I haven’s finished my saying. I just said I want to calculate N! mod 2009

Hint : 0! = 1, N! = N*(N-1)!

Input

Each line will contain one integer N(0 <= N<=10^9). Process to end of file.

Output

For each case, output N! mod 2009

Sample Input

45

Sample Output

24120

原思路

已知 2009! 因为有因数 2009 => 2009! mod 2009 == 0。因而包括 2009! 及以后的阶乘模 2009 结果必为 0，则只需算 2009 之前的。

Code

#include <iostream>int main() {    long long num;    while (std::cin >> num) {        long long sum = 1;        if (num < 2009) {            for (long long i = 1; i <= num; i++) {                sum *= i;                sum %= 2009;            }            std::cout << sum << std::endl;        }        else {            std::cout << 0 << std::endl;        }    }    return 0;}

改进思路

因为 2009 = 41 x 7 x 7，因而到 49 及以后的数的阶乘结果都将为 0.

改进后的 Code

#include <iostream>int main() {    long long num;    while (std::cin >> num) {        long long sum = 1;        if (num < 49) {            for (long long i = 1; i <= num; i++) {                sum *= i;                sum %= 2009;            }            std::cout << sum << std::endl;        }        else {            std::cout << 0 << std::endl;        }    }    return 0;}

entry.title: [博弈][水题] HDU 6312 "Game"
entry.content:
原题链接

HDU, Virtual Judge

题目

Alice and Bob are playing a game.
The game is played on a set of positive integers from 1 to n.
In one step, the player can choose a positive integer from the set, and erase all of its divisors from the set. If a divisor doesn’t exist it will be ignored.
Alice and Bob choose in turn, the one who cannot choose (current set is empty) loses.
Alice goes first, she wanna know whether she can win. Please judge by outputing ‘Yes’ or ‘No’.

Input

There might be multiple test cases, no more than 10. You need to read till the end of input.
For each test case, a line containing an integer n. (1≤n≤500)

Output

A line for each test case, ‘Yes’ or ‘No’.

Sample Input

1

Sample Output

Yes

思路

说实话这题是找出前几个的解后直接蒙的

Code

#include <iostream>int main() {    int num;    while (std::cin >> num) {        std::cout << "Yes" << std::endl;    }    return 0;}
